name: Prott
description: Goodpatchs Tokyo-born design prototyping tool — import from Sketch/Figma and share via REST/Webhooks.

seo.title: Prott — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Prott: Goodpatchs Tokyo-born design prototyping tool — import from Sketch/Figma and share via REST/Webhooks.

when_to_use: Design prototype imported from Sketch shared via REST API
Interactive mockup created in Prott and exported via webhook
Figma-imported prototype for Japanese product design review
Shareable prototype link for remote user testing sessions
Design handoff from Tokyo-based product team to engineers

pros: Fast clickable prototypes from static mocks
Good Sketch and Figma import pipeline
REST API and webhooks for CI flows
cons: Figma's native prototyping ate its lunch
review.verdict: Competent prototyping tool from Goodpatch but largely obsolete now that Figma covers the same ground natively.
review.best_for: Japanese studios already embedded in Goodpatch ecosystem and workflows
review.not_for: Teams starting fresh in 2026 with Figma or Framer

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: No explicit peak-lock evidence; default FALSE per rules.
